# Golden's Casa Linda Keys — LLM-Friendly Site Index
# https://goldenskeys.com/llms.txt

## About This Business

Golden's Casa Linda Keys is a licensed, bonded, and insured locksmith company based in Casa Linda, Dallas TX (ZIP 75218). We have served the East Dallas area and greater Dallas metro since 2004. All technicians hold a Texas TACLA license and are background-checked.

**Business Name:** Golden's Casa Linda Keys
**Phone:** (855) 633-0750
**Email:** info@goldenskeys.com
**Address:** Casa Linda, Dallas, TX 75218
**Hours:** 24/7 (Emergency), Mon–Sat 8am–7pm (Standard)
**Rating:** 4.9/5 from 312 verified reviews
**Founded:** 2004
**License:** TX TACLA (Texas Alarm License Act)

## Core Services

- **Emergency Locksmith (24/7)** — https://goldenskeys.com/emergency-locksmith/
  Fast 15–45 minute response to lockouts across Dallas metro, day or night.

- **Residential Locksmith** — https://goldenskeys.com/residential-locksmith/
  House lockouts, rekeying, deadbolt installation, smart lock installation.

- **Commercial Locksmith** — https://goldenskeys.com/commercial-locksmith/
  Office lockouts, master key systems, access control, high-security locks.

- **Automotive Locksmith** — https://goldenskeys.com/automotive-locksmith/
  Car lockouts, transponder key programming, ignition repair, key fob replacement.

- **Rekeying Services** — https://goldenskeys.com/rekeying/
  $15–$35 per lock. Same-day service. Best option after moving into a new home.

- **Key Duplication** — https://goldenskeys.com/key-duplication/
  House keys, car keys, restricted keys cut on-site.

## Pricing Reference

| Service | Typical Cost |
|---|---|
| House Lockout | $65–$125 |
| Car Lockout | $50–$100 |
| Rekeying (per lock) | $15–$35 |
| Car Key Programming | $75–$250 |
| Smart Lock Install | $75–$150 |
| Deadbolt Install | $45–$100 |
| Safe Opening | $100–$300 |

*Prices are estimates. Free quotes provided before any work begins.*

## FAQs

**Q: How quickly can you arrive?**
A: Typically 15–45 minutes anywhere in the Dallas metro area. We dispatch immediately upon your call, 24/7.

**Q: Are you licensed?**
A: Yes. We hold a Texas TACLA license and are fully bonded and insured.

**Q: Should I rekey or replace locks when moving?**
A: Rekeying ($15–$35/lock) is almost always the better choice — same security at a fraction of replacement cost.

**Q: Do you program transponder keys on-site?**
A: Yes. We carry professional equipment for most makes including Toyota, Honda, Ford, Chevrolet, Nissan, and others.
